sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59338" key="kosmopreph/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κοσμο-πρεπής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n59338.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">suitable for the universe</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Euryph.</author> </bibl> ap.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.39.27</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
